class.name: ASContainer
class.description: [ASContainer] stores the catalog of abilities, initial effects, and the attribute set configuration for an entity.

method.name: add_ability
method.description: Adds an ability resource to the container's catalog.

method.name: add_cue
method.description: Adds a cue resource to the container's catalog.

method.name: add_effect
method.description: Adds an effect resource to the initial effects list.

method.name: has_ability
method.description: Checks if an ability is in the catalog.

method.name: has_cue
method.description: Returns true if a cue with the specified tag exists in the container.

method.name: has_cue_resource
method.description: Check if the container's catalog includes the specific [ASCue] resource reference.

method.name: has_effect
method.description: Returns true if the specified effect resource is present in the container.

members.member: List of all abilities this archetype can potentially use.
The attribute configuration and default unlocked abilities.
List of events associated with this container that can be dispatched or heard.
